title: XP Share
description: Adds a command to give xp to friends!
body:
A simple little mod that adds one command: `/xpshare`.

Use it to give xp to your friends! Most of the time you'll want this: `/xpshare levels `, and their level number should go up by that much, with the appropriate amount of xp being subtracted from your own.

NOTE: this does NOT mean your levels will go down by the same number, due to the weird and needlessly logarithmic nature of levels in minecraft. If you wish to give a certain number of your levels, use `/xpshare my-levels ` intead. You can also use the `points` subcommand to give an exact amount of xp if you're doing more technical stuff for some reason.
